catthode.name: Catthode
catthode.description: From CRT to OLED. Bringing warmth back to a world of cold themes.

coffee.name: Coffee
coffee.description: Coffee Obsidian theme bringing duality of coffee flavors vibes through its dark (Dark Coffee) and light (Light Coffee) modes. This theme is designed to provide an ergonomic, soothing, and warm feel to your eyes, creating a comfortable working environment.

freecolors.name: FreeColors
freecolors.description: Customizable Obsidian theme featuring an external HTML Color Engine. Simulate UI elements and Rainbow Folders instantly, then import via JSON.

gruber-darker.name: Gruber Darker
gruber-darker.description: An Obsidian port of the Gruber Darker theme by rexim. High-contrast colors for focused writing.

handwriting-kalam.name: Handwriting (Kalam)
handwriting-kalam.description: A clean and friendly handwriting-style theme using Kalam font, with colored headings and academic-friendly formatting.

latsidian.name: Latsidian
latsidian.description: A clean LaTeX-style theme for Obsidian based on LaTeX.css

makinda.name: Makinda
makinda.description: Premium Light + Dark theme with warm orange accents. Auto-switches with system appearance.

miami-wind.name: Miami Wind
miami-wind.description: An Obsidian theme based on Miami Wind color scheme which is a blend of colors from Tailwind CSS and Greyscale colors from Catppuccin Mocha with inspiration from the theme Miami Nights for Monkeytype. Color Swatches built using Coolors

minimal-dark-coder.name: Minimal-Dark-Coder
minimal-dark-coder.description: Provies Minimal Dark Coder like theme designed specifically for coders. Perfect for those who want a sleek, coder-friendly interface for their notes and projects.

monkey-king.name: Monkey King
monkey-king.description: A Chinese-first Obsidian theme inspired by the cel-animation style of Havoc in Heaven, with dual scene presets and advanced typography settings.

mushin.name: Mushin
mushin.description: A zen-inspired Obsidian theme embodying the Japanese concept of mushin - a state of no-mind, clarity, and effortless flow. Designed for deep focus and mental tranquility.

nerv.name: nerv
nerv.description: An industrial brutalist command center interface for Obsidian.

noctis.name: Noctis
noctis.description: A theme for Obsidian based on Noctis' VS Code theme.

noctis-viola.name: Noctis Viola
noctis-viola.description: A theme for Obsidian based on Noctis Viola VS Code theme.

nostromo.name: Nostromo
nostromo.description: An 80's retro-futuristic theme with comfortable, muted colors. Perfect for space-age note-taking without the eye strain.

notion-style.name: Notion Style
notion-style.description: A full Notion-style visual overhaul for Obsidian — typography, code blocks, callouts, tables and more, with light/dark mode support.

nous.name: Nous
nous.description: A warm, literary Obsidian theme that blends Claude's editorial aesthetic with LaTeX academic typography. Parchment-toned surfaces, serif headlines, theorem-style callouts, and booktabs tables turn your vault into a scholar's paper.

ouroboros.name: Ouroboros
ouroboros.description: A clean and elegant Obsidian theme inspired by Things, with warm light and dark palettes, refined typography, and thoughtful customization.

pastel-yumekawa.name: Pastel-Yumekawa
pastel-yumekawa.description: パステル系でかわいくてゆめかわなObsidianテーマ

pxld.name: Pxld
pxld.description: This theme is inspired by pixelated games.

ravenloft.name: Ravenloft
ravenloft.description: A parchment-warm gothic theme inspired by AD&D 2e Ravenloft. Dual light/dark palettes, full typographic hierarchy.

shimmering-focus.name: Shimmering Focus
shimmering-focus.description: A minimalistic and opinionated Obsidian theme for the keyboard-centric user.

slatewave.name: Slatewave
slatewave.description: Dark slate + teal theme for Obsidian, sharing its palette with the Slatewave VSCode theme and oh-my-posh prompt. Licensed under WTFPL v2.

trace-labs.name: Trace Labs
trace-labs.description: This is the GitHub theme with color modifications made for Trace Labs

utility-materials.name: Utility Materials
utility-materials.description: Utility Materials themed Obsidian theme with dark greys and restrained orange accents.

vercel-geist.name: Vercel Obsidian
vercel-geist.description: A clean, modern Obsidian theme inspired by Vercel's design system with dark and light modes

vision.name: Vision
vision.description: A refined editorial theme. Cream paper with a subtle grid, elegant serif headings, crisp ink accents.

xscriptor.name: Xscriptor Theme
xscriptor.description: A refined literary-inspired theme for Obsidian, featuring EB Garamond typography and flexible customization for any workspace.
